subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! All praise be unto Thee for having given me to drink, from the chalice of Thy bounty, the Kawthar of Thy utterance, and for having made known unto me the Dawning-Place of Thy verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی لک الحمد بما سقیتنی من کاس عطائک کوثر بیانک و عرفتنی مشرق آیاتک
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
